invariants: Rust Core is domain owner — UI is passive renderer only
ZeroizeOnDrop on ALL key material types — no manual Drop impl
No raw pointer in pub extern C — use Token Protocol (opaque u64)
Dual-plane sync: CRDT DAG for chat only, NOT for Finance/HR data
AI only after SanitizedPrompt — PII redaction, no embedding egress
Headless daemon + gRPC before any UI expansion
Test never trails — SC-34 to SC-40 are deployment blockers
1 subsystem per phase — progressive complexity, no parallel subsystems
forbidden_patterns: impl Drop manually for key structs — use ZeroizeOnDrop derive
unwrap() in pub functions — use Result propagation
println!() with key material — never log sensitive data
SystemTime::now() for TTL — use Hardware Monotonic Tick-Clock
Raw pointer (*const u8, *mut u8) in pub extern C — use Token Protocol
Global CAS hash (BLAKE3 without workspace_id || salt) — tenant-salted only
Wall-clock timeout for WASM — use instruction fuel metering
f32/f64 in financial .tapp code — block by CI float-detection gate
